title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository – the core Go-based CLI and server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally with a simple REST API.

title: langchain/langchain
summary: LangChain’s monorepo contains @langchain/community/llms/ollama – the canonical Ollama integration for Python & JS chains/agents.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK maintained by the Ollama team; thin async client for chat, generate, pull, push, embeddings, etc.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official Node.js/JavaScript client; works in browser, Deno, Bun and serverless environments.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web interface (ChatGPT-like) for Ollama: multi-model chat, code highlighting, RAG, user auth, Docker ready.

title: llamafile
summary: Mozilla’s single-binary spin-off that can load Ollama GGUF models; integrates with Ollama server via new llamafile backend.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight SvelteKit UI for chatting with local Ollama models; one-click Docker deployment.

title: chainlit-ollama
summary: Cookbook showing how to use Ollama as the LLM backend for Chainlit conversational apps.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Template repo for Retrieval-Augmented Generation using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store in Python.

title: chatbot-ui-ollama
summary: Fork of Chatbot UI pre-configured to hit a local Ollama endpoint; minimal .env setup.

title: haystack-ollama
summary: Deepset Haystack 2.x integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot proxy that routes to a local Ollama model; VS Code extension included.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust rewrite of the Ollama CLI with added interactive REPL, syntax highlighting and shell completions.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama; integrates with Spring Boot and Micronaut.

title: ollama-chat-streamlit
summary: Streamlit app for chatting with Ollama models; supports voice input via STT and TTS output.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that adds /ask slash commands backed by any Ollama model; easy Docker deployment.
